title: NoPotionParticles
description: Those particles in the middle of the screen are quite bothersome, aren't they?
body:
# Keep your screen clean!

No Potion Particles removes all those annoying particles in the middle of the screen
![npp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07d2faa043be8d0ed599ff007f1724647afea5a8.png)

## Compatibility
| Version             | Supported             |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| 1.20 - 1.20.4            | ✅              |
| 1.19 - 1.19.4            | ✅              |
| 1.18 - 1.18.2            | ✅              |


## Mod Support
Do you want to see your favorite mod without particles or translate it? Request a mod to be added [here](https://discord.com/invite/nW4qUhABw4).

## Screenshots
